predicates.name: is_starting_company
predicates.description: The company is starting its business.

predicates.name: is_first_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the first financial year of the company.

predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately before the first financial year.

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the turnover threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The estimated employee threshold is exceeded for the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The estimated turnover threshold is exceeded for the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The estimated balance sheet total threshold is exceeded for the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one of the estimated criteria are exceeded for the financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company in the financial year, excluding VAT.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: estimated_annual_average_employees
functions.description: The good faith estimate of the annual average number of employees for the financial year.

functions.name: estimated_annual_net_turnover
functions.description: The good faith estimate of the annual net turnover for the financial year, excluding VAT.

functions.name: estimated_balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The good faith estimate of the balance sheet total for the financial year.
